name: Weakening Crystal
description: Macabre ornamentation and stretched bits of leather make this weapon look as though it were made from a shriveled limb. When you score a critical hit with a weakening weapon, the target takes a -4 penalty to its Strength score (to a minimum score of 1) for 10 minutes. Multiple strikes are not cumulative. Projectile weapons bestow this property upon their ammunition.
unidentifiedDesc: A macabre shriveled-limb weapon augmentation crystal.
